notes: Cathedral item layer. Mirrors the Fool's items.json shape — search piles populate from the cathedral location's search_pile fields; order items are what visitors expect after LISTEN; contents items are what COLLAGE produces (Magician's equivalent of the Fool's bindle contents). Items declaring a `scenarios` array are filtered to those scenarios only.

tape_blank.title: Blank 60-min Cassette
tape_blank.flavor: TDK, the cheap line, white label. Nobody has recorded on it yet.

tape_field_recording.title: Field-Recording Tape (river bank, 1986)
tape_field_recording.flavor: Twenty minutes of slow water and one freight train passing. Label in Frasier's hand.

tape_voice_memo.title: Voice Memo Cassette
tape_voice_memo.flavor: Frasier talking to himself for nineteen minutes. He thought it was deleted. It is not deleted.

tape_unannotated.title: An Unlabeled Cassette
tape_unannotated.flavor: Someone left it on top of the pile. The label is blank. The reel-sides are unevenly worn — somebody played one side a lot more.

tape_eliza_b_side.title: Eliza Mae B-Side (vol5 deep cut)
tape_eliza_b_side.flavor: A folk-blues 7-inch tape someone made him forty years ago. Loved by exactly two people, one of whom is dead.

tape_unfinished.title: Elicia's Unfinished Tape
tape_unfinished.flavor: She drove over with one tape. The first side is finished. The second side is what you're about to hear with her.

old_postcard.title: Old Postcard, Postmarked 1972
old_postcard.flavor: Sender unknown. The picture is of a downtown that no longer exists. The message on the back is one sentence, half-faded.

in_memoriam_card.title: In Memoriam Card
in_memoriam_card.flavor: A name printed on a beige card. The name is one you almost knew.

friend_of_a_friend_letter.title: Letter from a Friend's Friend
friend_of_a_friend_letter.flavor: Handwriting that isn't his sister's, isn't Nicola's, isn't his own. The letter starts: 'I hope this is the right address.'

birthday_card.title: Unused Birthday Card
birthday_card.flavor: Bought for someone, never sent. The intended recipient is unclear from context. The card is still in its plastic.

graustark_storefront_postcard.title: Postcard · Graustark Storefronts
graustark_storefront_postcard.flavor: Pre-sinkhole. The river bank in this picture is forty feet wider than it is now.

nicola_letter.title: Nicola's Letter
nicola_letter.flavor: Hand-delivered. The address on the envelope is wrong by one street. She got here anyway.

bbs_printout_help.title: BBS Printout · /help
bbs_printout_help.flavor: Dot-matrix output, faded. A list of commands he meant to memorize and never did.

usenet_thread_archive.title: Usenet Thread (alt.gauntlet.local)
usenet_thread_archive.flavor: A printed thread between three usernames he doesn't recognize, arguing about the same diner he can see from the window.

ascii_art_dump.title: ASCII Art Dump (someone's homepage)
ascii_art_dump.flavor: A printout of a stranger's painstaking 80-column ASCII portrait of his own face. He has never met them.

modem_handshake_log.title: Modem Handshake Log
modem_handshake_log.flavor: Pages of connection chirps and disconnects. Three of the disconnects are at the exact same wall-clock minute three nights in a row.

balsa_strip.title: Balsa Strip (1/8")
balsa_strip.flavor: Light enough to bend with breath. He's been planning the Briar Falls pavilion for a month.

tracing_paper_smolvud.title: Tracing-Paper Smolvud Overlay
tracing_paper_smolvud.flavor: A sheet of the future-Smolvud version of Briar Falls, drawn from photos of a place he hasn't been yet.

tree_armature.title: Tree Armature (wire + foil)
tree_armature.flavor: An unpainted wire-and-foil tree, the spine of a Briar Falls pine. The leaves come later.

foam_core_offcut.title: Foam-Core Offcut
foam_core_offcut.flavor: Cut from a panel he was building a Harmony Creek house with. The shape suggests another house could come out of it.

lawn_paint.title: Lawn Paint (model green, half-empty)
lawn_paint.flavor: The kind of green that doesn't quite exist in nature. The lid won't close all the way anymore.

identical_house.title: Identical House #7
identical_house.flavor: 1:48 of one of the Harmony Creek houses, painted to match all the others. There are seventeen others like it already on the bench.

pewter_saint_laurent.title: Pewter Saint-Laurent Strip
pewter_saint_laurent.flavor: A thin cast-pewter ribbon, shaped like the river that runs through Montreal. Frasier hasn't been. He's working from a postcard.

cabane_a_sucre_shingles.title: Cabane-à-Sucre Shingles
cabane_a_sucre_shingles.flavor: Tiny tin shingles, hand-bent. He read about this in a magazine. He's never seen sap rise.

triplex_stair_handrail.title: Triplex Stair Handrail
triplex_stair_handrail.flavor: 1:48 of the wrought-iron exterior stair railings the friend-of-a-friend in Montreal wrote about.

neon_wire.title: Neon Wire (cobalt)
neon_wire.flavor: Salvaged from a sign that didn't make it out of the renovation. Frasier already has the transformer.

basement_brick.title: Basement Brick (Sharp's bar)
basement_brick.flavor: A miniature of the unfinished basement brick from Sharp's club, smudge of sharpie in one corner.

speaker_cone.title: Tiny Speaker Cone
speaker_cone.flavor: Off a child's toy, repainted matte black. It will not play, but you can put it where the speakers were.

empty_platform_block.title: Empty Platform Block
empty_platform_block.flavor: A square of poplar he hasn't decided what to put on yet. He knows it goes at JUDGEMENT.

unmarked_plinth.title: Unmarked Plinth
unmarked_plinth.flavor: A small white-painted plinth, no figure on top. He'll know when he knows.

togo_diner_bag.title: TO-GO · D'Ambrosio's (chicken & waffles)
togo_diner_bag.flavor: Brown paper, top folded twice. The receipt is not in the bag. John walked it over.

cup_of_water.title: A Cup of Water
cup_of_water.flavor: Chipped enamel mug, the only one Frasier still uses for this. He fills it from the tap at the workbench sink.

contents_collage.title: Collage Piece
contents_collage.flavor: Three small things that wanted to be the same piece. You let them. The result is not entirely yours.

contents_letter_panel.title: Letter-Panel Collage
contents_letter_panel.flavor: Four letters from three hands and a postcard, fastened to a foam-core panel. Reads, almost, as a single voice.

contents_tape_collage.title: Tape-Loop Collage
contents_tape_collage.flavor: A short loop spliced from three cassettes. The loop is exactly the length you could hold a breath for.

contents_brass_assembly.title: Brass Assembly
contents_brass_assembly.flavor: Three pieces of brass mechanism that fit together one way out of many possible. The way they fit is correct.

contents_paper_construction.title: Paper Construction
contents_paper_construction.flavor: Layered paper at three depths. You can see through the front into the back. Light catches it differently from each side.

workbench_screwdriver.title: The Workbench Screwdriver
workbench_screwdriver.flavor: Phillips-head, balsa wood handle worn smooth. Always at the workbench. He has owned it for thirteen years.

spare_inspiration_token.title: A Half-Idea
spare_inspiration_token.flavor: A folded napkin with two lines on it. You can spend it like a beat. Once.
